name: UX Collab
description: Visual-first UI/UX collaboration skills using agent-browser, Figma MCP (design system), and Lucid (wireframes)

skills.name: ux-collab
skills.description: Full SEE → DISCUSS → IDEATE → SPECIFY → BUILD → VERIFY → SYNC → RECORD loop for UI/UX sessions with agent-browser (primary), Figma MCP (design system), and Lucid (wireframes)

skills.name: ux-collab-setup
skills.description: Install and configure all ux-collab dependencies — agent-browser, ImageMagick, Playwright MCP (optional), Figma MCP (optional), Lucid MCP (optional), project config

skills.name: code-to-figma
skills.description: Sync React components to Figma via CLI + local Figma Desktop plugin. Parses TSX/Babel AST, resolves Tailwind, generates Figma JSON, creates Figma Variable Collections from tokenMapping.

agents.name: ux-collab
agents.description: Visual-first UX collaboration agent with design system integration
